title: 比...更
prompt_en: Practice comparatives with -er and more + than.
prompt_zh: 练习比较级：-er + than / more + than。
description: 掌握比较级结构和常见不规则变化。
knowledge_points: 比较级 er than more than better

title: 最...的
prompt_en: Practice superlatives with the -est and the most.
description: 掌握最高级结构和用法。
knowledge_points: 最高级 the est the most best

title: 有...在...
prompt_en: Practice there is/are to describe existence.
description: 掌握there is/are的肯定/否定/疑问形式。
knowledge_points: there is there are 存在 位置

title: 在...里/上/旁边
prompt_en: Practice prepositions of place: in/on/at/under/next to.
description: 掌握常用位置介词的用法区别。
knowledge_points: 介词 位置 in on at under next to

title: 和...一样
knowledge_points: 同级比较 as as too enough 程度

title: 怎么做的
prompt_en: Practice adverbs of manner: quickly / carefully / well.
description: 掌握方式副词的构成和位置。
knowledge_points: 副词 方式 quickly well carefully 描述
